explanation:
KET LUAN: He thong dang o trang thai AN TOAN (Safe State).

Buoc 1: Chon tien trinh P1, vi Need[P1] = [1, 2, 2] <= Work hien tai = [3, 3, 2] (tren tung loai tai nguyen). Gia dinh P1 duoc cap du, chay xong va TRA LAI toan bo Allocation = [2, 0, 0] cho he thong -> Work moi = [5, 3, 2].
Buoc 2: Chon tien trinh P3, vi Need[P3] = [0, 1, 1] <= Work hien tai = [5, 3, 2] (tren tung loai tai nguyen). Gia dinh P3 duoc cap du, chay xong va TRA LAI toan bo Allocation = [2, 1, 1] cho he thong -> Work moi = [7, 4, 3].
Buoc 3: Chon tien trinh P0, vi Need[P0] = [7, 4, 3] <= Work hien tai = [7, 4, 3] (tren tung loai tai nguyen). Gia dinh P0 duoc cap du, chay xong va TRA LAI toan bo Allocation = [0, 1, 0] cho he thong -> Work moi = [7, 5, 3].
Buoc 4: Chon tien trinh P2, vi Need[P2] = [6, 0, 0] <= Work hien tai = [7, 5, 3] (tren tung loai tai nguyen). Gia dinh P2 duoc cap du, chay xong va TRA LAI toan bo Allocation = [3, 0, 2] cho he thong -> Work moi = [10, 5, 5].
Buoc 5: Chon tien trinh P4, vi Need[P4] = [4, 3, 1] <= Work hien tai = [10, 5, 5] (tren tung loai tai nguyen). Gia dinh P4 duoc cap du, chay xong va TRA LAI toan bo Allocation = [0, 0, 2] cho he thong -> Work moi = [10, 5, 7].

Safe Sequence tim duoc: <P1 -> P3 -> P0 -> P2 -> P4>.
Luu y quan trong: mot he thong an toan co the ton tai NHIEU Safe Sequence khac nhau, tuy thu tu chon tien trinh trong so cac tien trinh dang thoa dieu kien Need <= Work o moi buoc. Chi can TIM RA duoc it nhat MOT chuoi la du de ket luan he thong an toan; khong nhat thiet phai trung 100% voi chuoi tinh tay trong tai lieu.

request_simulation.reason: P0 xin vuot qua Need da khai bao -> loi cua tien trinh, tu choi ngay.
